name: Pavese Soup
method: Serves 6 2.5 litres good-quality chicken stock sea salt flakes 6 slices ciabatta bread 100 g grated Gruyère 100 g freshly grated parmigiano 6 organic eggs 1 bunch flat-leaf parsley, chopped ground black pepper
Put six wide soup bowls in a gentle oven just to heat them up (so the soup will stay piping hot).
Bring the chicken stock to a simmer and season. Keep the stock at simmering point while you grill or toast the ciabatta slices.
